3119150.name: InfernHells: A Divine Comedy
3119150.description:
ABANDON ALL HOPE YE WHO ENTER! These are the words that will welcome you to the InfernHells!
You Play as Dantus a Crimson Knight and Poet, as he explores his way through the 9 circles of hell in order to reach the deepest level containing Lord Lucian’s Castle.

Why does he want to go to the Castle of the Lord of Sin? Dantus does not say, for Hell has cursed him into a silent protagonist.
InfernHells combines classic turn based RPG mechanics with a healthy dose of humour. Battle comical demons, complete bizarre levels, and collect unique weapons and items to aid in your journey. As you progress, you will unlock new abilities and meet even more outlandish denizens of the underworld.

10-15 hours of epic gameplay!

This Game contains:

• 40 RPG monsters… er I mean demons of the underworld
• 9 levels… er I mean circles of Hell
• 7 boss battles… er I mean deadly sins you must defeat
• 3 hidden reference… er I mean noble souls that will help you on your journey
• 1 epic story filled with action, romance, drama and maybe even a twist!

Key Features:

• Engaging Narrative: Dive into a richly woven storyline filled with unexpected twists, comedic dialogue, and memorable characters.
• Immersive World: Explore a richly detailed hellish environment filled with hidden lore and deadly threats.
• Dynamic Combat: Engage in fast-paced, turn based combat with a range of weapons, skills and spells.
• Character Progression: Build your character with robust skills and unlock powerful magical abilities as you level up.
• Epic Boss Battles: Face off against colossal demons and ancient sins in thrilling encounters.

So what are you waiting for? Embark on a journey like no other in InfernHells, where the boundaries between comedy and tragedy blur, and the path to redemption is paved with laughter and unexpected surprises!
3119150.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
